text: I feel a quiet sense of anticipation and curiosity as I stand outside this glass entrance, peering into a space marked 'R+D.' The world inside promises explorations of thought and innovation—an environment that invites wonder, questioning, and perhaps small revelations. I am aware of my own presence as both observer and participant, eager to engage with ideas laid out within, and to let them reframe my understanding of the everyday. There is an air of thoughtful possibility here.
